<!-- Generated with https://github.com/reakaleek/gh-action-readme -->

# <!--name-->Upload Codecov Report<!--/name-->

<!--description-->
Upload a coverage or test-results report to Codecov through the pinned Codecov action.
<!--/description-->

## Inputs

<!--inputs-->
| Name               | Description                                            | Required | Default    |
|--------------------|--------------------------------------------------------|----------|------------|
| `files`            | Report file paths passed to Codecov.                   | `true`   | ` `        |
| `flags`            | Codecov flags.                                         | `false`  | ` `        |
| `name`             | Codecov upload name.                                   | `false`  | ` `        |
| `report-type`      | Codecov report type, such as coverage or test_results. | `false`  | `coverage` |
| `slug`             | Repository slug. Defaults to github.repository.        | `false`  | ` `        |
| `use-oidc`         | Use Codecov OIDC upload.                               | `false`  | `true`     |
| `fail-ci-if-error` | Fail CI when Codecov upload fails.                     | `false`  | `true`     |
| `disable-search`   | Disable Codecov file discovery.                        | `false`  | `true`     |
| `verbose`          | Enable verbose Codecov action logging.                 | `false`  | `true`     |
<!--/inputs-->

## Outputs

<!--outputs-->
| Name | Description |
|------|-------------|
<!--/outputs-->

## Usage

<!--usage action="Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/upload-codecov-report" version="main"-->

```yaml
steps:
 - name: "Upload coverage to Codecov"
   uses: "Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/upload-codecov-report@main"
   with:
    files: "${{ steps.vitest.outputs.coverage_path }}"
    flags: "linux"
    name: "vitest-unit-coverage-linux"
    report-type: "coverage"
```

<!--/usage-->
